meta.description: Free AI courses for educators and students — verified and curated

courses.name: Claude 101
courses.desc: Everyday AI tasks with Claude: core features, productivity, practical applications. No prior experience needed.

courses.name: AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations
courses.desc: Collaborate with AI effectively, ethically and safely. Ideal for any professional or educator.

courses.name: AI Fluency for Educators
courses.desc: For faculty, instructional designers and educational leaders. Apply AI fluency in teaching practice and strategy.

courses.name: AI Fluency for Students
courses.desc: Develop AI fluency to enhance learning, career planning and academic success through responsible AI.

courses.name: Teaching AI Fluency
courses.desc: For faculty and instructional designers. How to teach and assess AI Fluency in instructor-led settings.

courses.name: AI Fluency for Nonprofits
courses.desc: Increase organisational impact and efficiency with AI while staying true to mission and values.

courses.name: Building with the Claude API
courses.desc: Full developer course on Anthropic models via the Claude API with hands-on coding exercises.

courses.name: Introduction to Model Context Protocol (MCP)
courses.desc: Build MCP servers and clients in Python. Tools, resources and prompts primitives explained.

courses.name: Claude Code in Action
courses.desc: Integrate Claude Code into development workflows. Agentic coding and real-world use cases.

courses.name: Claude with Amazon Bedrock
courses.desc: First-of-its-kind training on using Claude via AWS infrastructure. Full course publicly available.

courses.name: Generative AI for Educators with Gemini
courses.desc: 2-hour self-paced. Use Gemini & NotebookLM to save time, personalise instruction and enhance lessons.

courses.name: Google AI Essentials
courses.desc: Under 15 hours. Generative AI tools, prompt engineering and AI responsibility. Employer-recognised certificate.

courses.name: Google Prompting Essentials
courses.desc: Write effective AI prompts using a 5-step framework. Standalone certificate from Google.

courses.name: Generative AI Learning Path (Google Cloud)
courses.desc: 10 short courses on GenAI concepts, LLMs and responsible AI. Google Cloud skill badges awarded.

courses.name: AI for Students (Grow with Google)
courses.desc: Free workshop on using AI as a study tool, for career planning and productivity.

courses.name: Artificial Intelligence Fundamentals
courses.desc: NLP, computer vision, ML, deep learning, AI ethics. Earn verified IBM Digital Badge via Credly.

courses.name: AI Foundations (ISTE + IBM)
courses.desc: Comprehensive AI intro for students and classrooms. IBM Digital Badge. Educator facilitator guide included.

courses.name: IBM AI Foundations for Educators
courses.desc: 9 free on-demand webinars covering ML, NLP, ethics and robotics. IBM Digital Badge for Educators.

courses.name: Generative AI Fundamentals (IBM SkillsBuild)
courses.desc: Practical GenAI skills: what it is, how it works, responsible use. Free IBM digital credential.

courses.name: AI Skills Navigator + Free Educator Courses
courses.desc: Free self-paced courses, live sessions and AI simulations in 13+ languages. Microsoft Elevate for Educators Credential.

courses.name: Embark on Your AI Journey with Microsoft AI Tools
courses.desc: 3-hour intro for educators covering Copilot, Teams AI tools and lesson planning with AI.

courses.name: AI for Beginners (Microsoft GitHub Curriculum)
courses.desc: 26-lesson open-source curriculum covering AI, ML, neural networks, NLP and computer vision.

courses.name: Applied Skills: Streamline Workflows with AI Chat
courses.desc: Scenario-based credential. Proves ability to use AI chat in real work tasks. Free lab-based assessment.

courses.name: Intro to Generative AI (Azure AI Fundamentals Path)
courses.desc: Free learning module on AI concepts, ML and responsible AI. Prepares for AI-900 (exam fee applies).

courses.name: Introduction to Generative AI (AWS Educate)
courses.desc: Foundational GenAI covering LLMs, foundation models, responsible AI and prompt engineering. Free badge, no account needed.

courses.name: Generative AI for Decision Makers
courses.desc: 3-course series on AI possibilities, project planning and building a GenAI-ready organisation. 90 minutes total.

courses.name: Foundations of Prompt Engineering
courses.desc: Covers prompt basics to advanced techniques. No coding needed. Free via AWS Skill Builder.

courses.name: Introduction to Responsible AI
courses.desc: Free short course on AI fairness, privacy, transparency and governance. Relevant for educators.

courses.name: Introduction to AI (Elements of AI)
courses.desc: 2M+ students in 170+ countries. No math or coding required. 25 hours self-paced. University of Helsinki certificate.

courses.name: Building AI (Elements of AI)
courses.desc: Sequel to Intro to AI. Covers actual AI algorithms. Basic Python helpful. University of Helsinki certificate.

courses.name: Ethics of AI (Elements of AI)
courses.desc: AI ethics, fairness, bias and societal impact. Ideal for educators and students. Helsinki certificate.

courses.name: AI for Everyone
courses.desc: Non-technical. 700k+ learners. AI terminology, business strategy and ethics by Andrew Ng. ~5 hours.

courses.name: Generative AI for Everyone
courses.desc: Non-technical. GenAI limitations, real-world use cases and business impacts. Certificate via financial aid.

courses.name: AI for Good Specialization
courses.desc: 3-course series using AI to address global challenges. No coding needed. Certificate via financial aid.

providers.name: Univ. of Maryland
providers.sub: Robert H. Smith School of Business

courses.name: AI & Career Empowerment Certificate
courses.desc: 100% free certificate from a top US business school. For professionals and educators pivoting to AI-enabled roles.

courses.name: Introduction to AI (Alison)
courses.desc: Free, globally recognised. AI basics, ML and neural networks. Free digital certificate on completion.

courses.name: Artificial Intelligence (MIT OpenCourseWare)
courses.desc: Free MIT lectures, readings and assignments. No certificate but MIT-quality content. Completely free.

courses.name: CS50's Introduction to AI with Python (Harvard)
courses.desc: Harvard's CS50 AI course: search, ML and neural networks with Python. Free audit; paid cert available.
